sentence: 久坐容易引起臀部疼痛。
pinyin: Jiǔ zuò róngyì yǐnqǐ túnbù téngtòng.
english: Sitting for long periods can easily cause buttock pain.

meaning: 1. labor; 2. able-bodied worker; 3. laborer; 4. work force
sentence: 农忙时节，村里劳力都下地干活了。
pinyin: Nóngmáng shíjié, cūn lǐ láolì dōu xià dì gànhuó le.
english: During the busy farming season all the laborers in the village went to work in the fields.

meaning: 1. to fall from power; 2. to collapse; 3. demise
sentence: 管理混乱导致公司最终垮台。
pinyin: Guǎnlǐ hǔnluàn dǎozhì gōngsī zuìzhōng kuǎtái.
english: Poor management caused the company to eventually collapse.

sentence: 铁道边不许随意穿行。
pinyin: Tiědào biān bù xǔ suíyì chuānxíng.
english: Crossing the railway track at will is not permitted.

meaning: 1. to hire (an employee); 2. to accept (a manuscript) for publication
sentence: 公司决定录用他担任市场助理。
pinyin: Gōngsī juédìng lùyòng tā dānrèn shìchǎng zhùlǐ.
english: The company decided to hire him as a marketing assistant.

sentence: 这句广告语用了双关，既有趣又好记。
pinyin: Zhè jù guǎnggào yǔ yòng le shuāngguān, jì yǒuqù yòu hǎo jì.
english: This advertising slogan uses a pun, making it both fun and memorable.

meaning: 1. mythical horse; 2. Internet slang for 什麼|什么[shén me]
sentence: 神马都是浮云，别太在意。
pinyin: Shénmǎ dōu shì fúyún, bié tài zàiyì.
english: Whatever—it's all fleeting, don't mind it too much.

sentence: 他始终保有对学习的热情。
pinyin: Tā shǐzhōng bǎo yǒu duì xuéxí de rèqíng.
english: He has always retained his enthusiasm for learning.

meaning: 1. anteroom; 2. vestibule; 3. lobby (of a hotel etc)
sentence: 客人在前厅等候，服务员上了茶。
pinyin: Kèrén zài qiántīng děnghòu, fúwùyuán shàng le chá.
english: The guests waited in the lobby and the staff brought them tea.

meaning: 1. letters or words; 2. words or phrase
sentence: 这本词典收录了很多常用字词。
pinyin: Zhè běn cídiǎn shōulù le hěn duō chángyòng zìcí.
english: This dictionary includes many commonly used words and characters.

sentence: 我们找到了一个可靠的合作伙伴。
pinyin: Wǒmen zhǎodào le yī gè kěkào de hézuò huǒbàn.
english: We found a reliable cooperative partner.

sentence: 这个研究计划已经正式立项。
pinyin: Zhège yánjiū jìhuà yǐjīng zhèngshì lìxiàng.
english: This research plan has been officially approved and launched.

sentence: 她在大学主修生物分类学。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué zhǔxiū shēngwù fēnlèixué.
english: She majored in biological taxonomy at university.

sentence: 周末他喜欢去山林里散步，呼吸新鲜空气。
pinyin: Zhōu mò tā xǐ huān qù shān lín lǐ sàn bù, hū xī xīn xiān kōng qì.
english: On weekends he likes to walk in the mountain forest and breathe fresh air.

sentence: 他是个鬼才，总能想出别人想不到的点子。
pinyin: Tā shì gè guǐ cái, zǒng néng xiǎng chū bié rén xiǎng bù dào de diǎn zi.
english: He's a creative genius who always comes up with ideas nobody else thinks of.

meaning: to produce (graduates, breast milk, toxic waste, creative ideas etc);
sentence: 这台机器每天的产出是一千个零件。
pinyin: Zhè tái jī qì měi tiān de chǎn chū shì yī qiān gè líng jiàn.
english: This machine's daily output is one thousand parts.

sentence: 他毕业后进入银行业，现在是一家银行的经理。
pinyin: Tā bì yè hòu jìn rù yín háng yè, xiàn zài shì yī jiā yín háng de jīng lǐ.
english: After graduating he entered banking and is now a manager at a bank.

meaning: social-media editor; page admin; creator of online content (often used
sentence: 小编整理了十个最实用的生活小技巧。
pinyin: Xiǎo biān zhěng lǐ le shí gè zuì shí yòng de shēng huó xiǎo jì qiǎo.
english: The editor has put together ten of the most practical everyday tips.

sentence: 这辆卡车后面拖着一节挂车，装满了货物。
pinyin: Zhè liàng kǎ chē hòu miàn tuō zhe yī jié guà chē, zhuāng mǎn le huò wù.
english: This truck is towing a trailer behind it, loaded with goods.

sentence: 妈妈红烧的带鱼特别香，我每次都能吃好几块。
pinyin: Māma hóng shāo de dài yú tè bié xiāng, wǒ měi cì dōu néng chī hǎo jǐ kuài.
english: Mom's braised hairtail fish smells amazing — I can always eat several pieces.

meaning: public institution; (Tw) business enterprise; company; firm
sentence: 她在一家事业单位工作，福利待遇很好。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā shì yè dān wèi gōng zuò, fú lì dài yù hěn hǎo.
english: She works at a public institution that offers very good benefits.

sentence: 既往的事就不要再提了，向前看才重要。
pinyin: Jì wǎng de shì jiù bù yào zài tí le, xiàng qián kàn cái zhòng yào.
english: Don't bring up past things anymore — looking forward is what matters.

meaning: (of an organization) to have as a subunit
sentence: 这个部门下设三个科室，各有分工。
pinyin: Zhè ge bù mén xià shè sān gè kē shì, gè yǒu fēn gōng.
english: This department has three sub-offices, each with its own responsibilities.

sentence: 这个城市的平均收入比全国水平高不少。
pinyin: Zhè ge chéng shì de píng jūn shōu rù bǐ quán guó shuǐ píng gāo bù shǎo.
english: The average income in this city is considerably higher than the national level.

sentence: 合同纠纷一般按民法的规定来处理。
pinyin: Hé tong jiū fēn yī bān àn mín fǎ de guī dìng lái chǔ lǐ.
english: Contract disputes are generally handled according to civil law provisions.

meaning: gross domestic production (GDP); total output value
sentence: 去年这个省的生产总值超过了五万亿元。
pinyin: Qù nián zhè ge shěng de shēng chǎn zǒng zhí chāo guò le wǔ wàn yì yuán.
english: Last year this province's gross output value exceeded five trillion yuan.

meaning: water meter; indicator of water level
sentence: 物业每个月来抄一次水表。
pinyin: Wù yè měi gè yuè lái chāo yī cì shuǐ biǎo.
english: Property management reads the water meter once a month.

sentence: 战士们在寒冷的冬天坚守边防，保卫国家。
pinyin: Zhàn shì men zài hán lěng de dōng tiān jiān shǒu biān fáng, bǎo wèi guó jiā.
english: The soldiers guard the frontier defense through the cold winter to protect the country.

sentence: 新的法律需要经过立法机关审议通过。
pinyin: Xīn de fǎ lǜ xū yào jīng guò lì fǎ jī guān shěn yì tōng guò.
english: New laws must be reviewed and passed by the legislature.

sentence: 阳台上摆了几盆花卉。
pinyin: Yángtái shàng bǎi le jǐ pén huāhuì.
english: A few pots of flowers and plants are arranged on the balcony.

sentence: 街上停着一辆警车，引来很多人围观。
pinyin: Jiē shang tíng zhe yī liàng jǐng chē, yǐn lái hěn duō rén wéiguān.
english: A police car was parked on the street, drawing a crowd of onlookers.

sentence: 他背着大包走了很远的路。
pinyin: Tā bèi zhe dà bāo zǒu le hěn yuǎn de lù.
english: He walked a long way carrying a large bag on his back.

sentence: 这根电线老化了，需要换掉。
pinyin: Zhè gēn diànxiàn lǎohuà le, xūyào huàn diào.
english: This wire has aged and needs to be replaced.

meaning: 1. domestic and international; 2. at home and abroad
sentence: 这位作家的作品在海内外都很有名。
pinyin: Zhè wèi zuò jiā de zuò pǐn zài hǎi nèi wài dōu hěn yǒu míng.
english: This writer's works are well known both at home and abroad.

meaning: 1. in accordance with; 2. to follow (the rules)
sentence: 请遵照医嘱按时服药。
pinyin: Qǐng zūn zhào yī zhǔ àn shí fú yào.
english: Please follow the doctor's instructions and take your medication on time.

meaning: 1. traffic police; 2. abbr. for 交通警察
sentence: 交警站在路口指挥交通。
pinyin: Jiāo jǐng zhàn zài lùkǒu zhǐhuī jiāotōng.
english: The traffic police officer stood at the intersection directing traffic.

sentence: 他们决定领养一只流浪猫。
pinyin: Tāmen juédìng lǐngyǎng yī zhī liúlàng māo.
english: They decided to adopt a stray cat.

meaning: 1. evening newspaper; 2. (in a newspaper's name) Evening News
sentence: 他下班路上买了一份晚报。
pinyin: Tā xiàbān lùshang mǎi le yī fèn wǎnbào.
english: He bought an evening newspaper on his way home from work.

meaning: 1. willingness; 2. would rather (agree to X than Y)
sentence: 她情愿走路上班，也不想挤地铁。
pinyin: Tā qíngyuàn zǒulù shàngbān, yě bù xiǎng jǐ dìtiě.
english: She would rather walk to work than squeeze onto the subway.

sentence: 他们周末徒步爬了一座山。
pinyin: Tāmen zhōumò túbù páile yī zuò shān.
english: They hiked up a mountain on the weekend.

sentence: 她高龄九十岁，身体依然很健康。
pinyin: Tā gāolíng jiǔshí suì, shēntǐ yīrán hěn jiànkāng.
english: She is ninety years old and still in very good health.

meaning: 1. to be willing to part with sth
sentence: 她舍得花时间陪孩子。
pinyin: Tā shě de huā shíjiān péi háizi.
english: She is willing to spend time with her kids.

meaning: 1. to major (in a field); 2. to study a specialty to obtain a higher d
sentence: 她正在攻读硕士学位。
pinyin: Tā zhèngzài gōngdú shuòshì xuéwèi.
english: She is currently pursuing a master's degree.

meaning: 1. to submit articles for publication; 2. to contribute (writing)
sentence: 她把自己写的文章投稿给了一家杂志。
pinyin: Tā bǎ zìjǐ xiě de wénzhāng tóugǎo gěi le yī jiā zázhì.
english: She submitted her article to a magazine.

meaning: fuel gas (coal gas, natural gas, methane etc)
sentence: 厨房的燃气灶用起来很方便。
pinyin: Chúfáng de ránqì zào yòng qǐlái hěn fāngbiàn.
english: The gas stove in the kitchen is very convenient to use.

sentence: 春季要注意做好防疫工作。
pinyin: Chūnjì yào zhùyì zuòhǎo fángyì gōngzuò.
english: In spring it's important to take epidemic prevention measures.

sentence: 房间空旷，四壁无物。
pinyin: Fángjiān kōngkuàng, sì bì wúwù.
english: The room was wide open with nothing on the four walls.

sentence: 医生建议妈妈坚持用母乳喂养宝宝。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiànyì māma jiānchí yòng mǔrǔ wèiyǎng bǎobao.
english: The doctor advises mothers to persist in breastfeeding their babies.

sentence: 新的领导班子已经正式成立。
pinyin: Xīn de lǐngdǎo bānzi yǐjīng zhèngshì chénglì.
english: The new leadership team has been officially established.

sentence: 他从不在意富贵，只想过平静的生活。
pinyin: Tā cóng bù zàiyì fùguì, zhǐ xiǎng guò píngjìng de shēnghuó.
english: He never cares about wealth and status; he just wants a peaceful life.
